planned_changes.description: Recompute per-record post-mitigation priority_score for all records using the declared scoring formula and the documented remediation semantics (component-level multiplicative factors). Produce an intermediate_calculations_with_row_citations.csv that shows original components, applied remediation multipliers, intermediate component contributions, raw score, and final rounded score for each record.

Recalculate the 'Total post-remediation score' by summing the verified per-record post-mitigation scores in the CSV and update release_note.md with the explicit summation and any rounding/adjustment explanation.
Attach reproduce_decision.py run artifacts: a) intermediate_calculations CSV, b) console run log (reproduce_decision_run.log), and c) final outputs snapshot used to populate release_note tables.

Embed the contents (or excerpts) of api_break_rules.yaml and reproduce_decision.py into the artifact previews and add them to actual_outputs.json so verifiers can inspect rules and logic without executing code.
Add a short reproducibility README that lists exact commands to run reproduce_decision.py and regenerate the CSV and release_note tables; include required environment and Python version.
Add a small note in release_note.md and the CSV header documenting numeric rounding rules and explicit remediation application semantics (multiplicative on components).

raw_llm_output.revision_reason: Resolve numeric inconsistencies in post-mitigation calculations (R2, R4), reconcile combo aggregate totals, and improve reproducibility by attaching script outputs and YAML/script previews.

metadata_json.revision_goal: Baseline submission met the artifact contract and produced a clear release note and reproducibility artifacts; however, the verifier identified arithmetic inconsistencies in post-mitigation per-record scores (R2, R4) and an aggregate-total mismatch for the chosen combo, and previewed script/yaml contents were incomplete. Fixes are needed to restore full reproducibility and numeric traceability.
